title: Embraceable You
writer: Edna Anhalt, Dietrich V. Hannekin, Aleck Block
actors: Dane Clark, Geraldine Brooks, S.Z. Sakall
plot: The killer and his driver Eddie Novoc accidentally run over Marie Willens while fleeing a murder scene. The pursuing detective Matt Hethron is sure that Eddie is guilty, but he cannot prove it. Instead of pressing his case, Hethro...
